title: Align Japanese cockpit runtime guide

sources.reason: English cockpit runtime guide already documents the Governance Compression layer and serves as the source of truth.
Roadmap already marks V2.5 as implemented and names the governance compression layer.
Reference plan defines the Cockpit recommendation vocabulary and human decision state.

riskAssessment.reason: This is a narrow language-sync update for an already implemented runtime guide.

executionDecision.reason: The Japanese cockpit guide can be aligned directly from the English runtime guide and roadmap.

preReviewWarnings: Keep the Japanese cockpit guide aligned with the English runtime guide and terminology.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: .ai/cockpit/README.ja.md explains the Governance Compression / Cockpit recommendation layer.
The Japanese runtime guide keeps V2.5 terminology aligned with the English cockpit guide and roadmap.
current_status.md is regenerated and remains consistent after the change.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The Japanese cockpit runtime guide still describes only the V2 lifecycle and does not explain the implemented Governance Compression layer or the recommendation-oriented current status output.
constraints: Do not change the already-implemented governance behavior.
Keep terminology consistent with the English cockpit guide and roadmap.
Regenerate current_status.md instead of hand-editing it.
intent.rationale: Bring the Japanese runtime guide into alignment with the already-implemented V2.5 cockpit model so the repository entrypoints stay consistent across languages.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The task explicitly requires synchronized updates to the Japanese cockpit runtime guide under .ai/cockpit/.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
